generated_with.note: brukeropusreader is used locally, at dev time, purely as an oracle to generate this JSON. No brukeropusreader source is committed to the Spectra repo; only the derived numeric ground truth is. brukeropusreader's parse_series() does NOT apply the CSF (Y-Scaling Factor) parameter -- it returns the raw floats stored in the AB data block. This script applies CSF manually to produce 'firstAB' (CSF-scaled), matching what Task 8's Swift reader should also do. CSF was 1.0 for all three fixtures below, so raw and CSF-scaled values happen to be identical here; Task 8 must not assume CSF is always 1.0 in real files.

cross_checked_with.note: brukeropus DOES apply CSF scaling itself (file/data.py: self.y = self.params.csf * y[:self.params.npt]) and pairs data/data-status blocks more carefully than brukeropusreader (brukeropus/file/block.py: pair_data_and_status_blocks). Used to verify brukeropusreader picked the correct AB block on files with multiple absorbance-type blocks (629266_1TP_A-1_C1.0 has both 'a' and 'a_2'); confirmed brukeropusreader's naive last-match-wins AB dict entry equals brukeropus's 'a' (not 'a_2') for that file, to float32 precision.

rejected_candidates.opusreader2/inst/extdata/test_data/test_: brukeropusreader misparses this file's AB block (values are denormalized float garbage, e.g. 1.68e-44). Cross-check with brukeropus shows this file has no true absorbance ('a') result at all -- its real result block is Reflectance ('r'). Excluded as an AB ground-truth fixture; brukeropusreader's data_type==15 -> 'AB' assumption is not reliable in general.
rejected_candidates.opusreader2/inst/extdata/new_data/issue8: brukeropusreader reports AB len=690 vs NPT=1866; brukeropus reports len(y)==npt==1866 with correct pairing. Confirms brukeropusreader's dict-keyed-by-name block matching silently keeps the wrong data_type==15 block when a file has more than one. Excluded.
Similar mismatch (AB len=1154 vs NPT=1112) and the file also contains 'match'/'match_2ch' library-search result blocks that confuse the naive data_type dispatch. Excluded.
rejected_candidates.opusreader2/inst/extdata/new_data/issue9: No 'AB Data Parameter' block at all (NPT/FXV/LXV/DXU all None). Not usable for this ground truth shape. Excluded.
rejected_candidates.spectrochempy_data testdata/irdata/OPUS/: spectrochempy_data (github.com/spectrochempy/spectrochempy_data) carries no LICENSE file of its own and its CONTRIBUTING.md/MAINTENANCE.md do not state a data license; the parent spectrochempy package is CeCILL-B but that does not obviously extend to this separate, unlicensed data repo. Excluded for lack of a verifiable redistribution license.
